name: DEF CON 1
description: The first DEF CON, held in Las Vegas at the Sands Hotel. The gathering that started it all.

name: DEF CON 2
description: DEF CON 2 at the Sahara Hotel. Early hacker culture and phone phreaking talks.

name: DEF CON 3
description: DEF CON 3. The conference grows as the internet era begins.

name: DEF CON 4
description: DEF CON 4. Web security topics begin emerging alongside traditional hacking.

name: DEF CON 5
description: DEF CON 5 at the Aladdin Hotel. Cryptography and network security in focus.

name: DEF CON 6
description: DEF CON 6. The L0pht testifies before Congress; hacking goes mainstream.

name: DEF CON 7
description: DEF CON 7 at the Alexis Park. Y2K concerns and early buffer overflow research.

name: DEF CON 8
description: DEF CON 8. The new millennium brings wireless hacking and wardriving.

name: DEF CON 9
description: DEF CON 9. Post-9/11 security landscape shifts hacking discourse.

name: DEF CON 10
description: DEF CON 10. A decade of DEF CON. Milestone celebration with expanded tracks.

name: DEF CON 11
description: DEF CON 11 at the Alexis Park. RFID hacking and embedded systems security.

name: DEF CON 12
description: DEF CON 12. First year with video recordings of presentations.

name: DEF CON 13
description: DEF CON 13 at the Riviera Hotel. VoIP hacking and web app exploitation.

name: DEF CON 14
description: DEF CON 14. ATM hacking, SCADA security, and early IoT vulnerability research.

name: DEF CON 15
description: DEF CON 15 at the Riviera. Dateline NBC infiltration incident. Badge hacking era begins.

name: DEF CON 16
description: DEF CON 16. DNS cache poisoning (Kaminsky bug), voting machine hacking.

name: DEF CON 17
description: DEF CON 17 at the Riviera. GSM interception, SSL/TLS attacks, and cloud security.

name: DEF CON 18
description: DEF CON 18. Stuxnet discovery year. Critical infrastructure and ICS security.

name: DEF CON 19
description: DEF CON 19 at the Rio. Mobile security, Android exploitation, and hacktivism era.

name: DEF CON 20
description: DEF CON 20 at the Rio. Two decades of hacking. NSA director keynote makes history.

name: DEF CON 21
description: DEF CON 21. Post-Snowden revelations. Privacy, surveillance, and cryptography in spotlight.

name: DEF CON 22
description: DEF CON 22 at Paris/Bally's. USB Rubber Ducky, BadUSB, and hardware hacking.

name: DEF CON 23
description: DEF CON 23 at Paris/Bally's. Car hacking (Jeep hack), Stagefright, and IoT village.

name: DEF CON 24
description: DEF CON 24 at Paris/Bally's. Election security, Voting Village launches, and AI hacking.

name: DEF CON 25
description: DEF CON 25 at Caesars Palace. Voting machine hacking, WannaCry/NotPetya aftermath.

name: DEF CON 26
description: DEF CON 26 at Caesars Palace. Supply chain attacks, blockchain security, and red team infrastructure.

name: DEF CON 27
description: DEF CON 27. Aerospace Village launches. 5G security, deepfakes, and cloud exploitation.

name: DEF CON 28 (Safe Mode)
description: DEF CON 28 Safe Mode. First virtual DEF CON due to COVID-19. Full talks available online.

name: DEF CON 29
description: DEF CON 29. Hybrid event. Log4j era, ransomware evolution, and supply chain security.

name: DEF CON 30
description: DEF CON 30 at Caesars Forum. Three decades of hacking. AI Village and Aerospace Village expand.

name: DEF CON 31
description: DEF CON 31. AI Red Teaming event with White House. LLM security and AI safety in focus.

name: DEF CON 32
description: DEF CON 32 at the LVCC. Post-quantum cryptography, AI agents, and satellite hacking.

name: DEF CON 33
description: DEF CON 33. Latest conference materials, presentations, and village content.

name: DEF CON China Beta
description: DEF CON China Beta. The inaugural DEF CON event in Beijing, China.

name: DEF CON China 1
description: DEF CON China 1. Full DEF CON experience in Beijing with talks, villages, and CTF.

name: DEF CON China Party
description: DEF CON China Party event materials and media.

name: DEF CON NYE 2020
description: DEF CON New Year's Eve 2020 virtual event. A pandemic-era special gathering.
